arts.ttl: Barcelona open to selling midfielder Pep Guardiola has on Rodri replacement shortlist
arts.sum: Manchester City are set to enter the January transfer market in search of a replacement for Rodri. The Spanish midfielder has been ruled out for most of the season after injuring his ACL against Arsenal at the Etihad Stadium last weekend. arts.ttl: “One of the best in history” – David Silva makes bold claim on Barcelona sensation Lamine Yamal
arts.sum: Lamine Yamal has garnered lots of plaudits since he made his Barcelona debut in April 2023. The 17-year-old sensation continues to go from strength and strength, and already, he is considered to be a world class player. Spain icon David Silva is one of the many to be amazed by Lamine Yamal. arts.ttl: Barcelona to make important Frenkie de Jong decision next week
arts.sum: Earlier this month, Frenkie de Jong made his long-awaited return to Barcelona training. He has been out of action since April with a troubling ankle injury – he was only supposed to be unavailable for 4-5 weeks, but that has ended up turning into over five months. arts.ttl: Predicted Teams Osasuna-Barcelona: Hansi Flick to make one change from Getafe victory
arts.sum: Barcelona made it seven wins from wins when they narrowly defeated Getafe at the Estadi Olimpic on Wednesday, and now the intention is to go for eight from eight when they make the trip to El Sadar on Saturday evening. Osasuna will be the opponents for Hansi Flick’s all-conquering side. arts.ttl: Man City 'planning move' for Barcelona star as Catalan outfit 'reach agreement'
arts.sum: Manchester City are allegedly planning to move for Barcelona midfielder Frenkie de Jong in 2025.

arts.ttl: Osasuna vs Barcelona: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Osasuna, who have finished in the top ten in two of the previous three La Liga seasons, are undefeated in four home league matches so far in 2024/25 and most recently held Valencia to a goalless draw. Barca's positive start to the league campaign has been besmirched by the season-ending injury suffered by goalkeeper Marc-Andre ter Stegen in the 5-1 thrashing of Villarreal.

arts.ttl: Will Wojciech Szczesny be Barcelona's number one goalkeeper this season?
arts.sum: Experienced goalkeeper Wojciech Szczesny has reportedly not being guaranteed the number one spot at Barcelona for the 2024-25 campaign.
